User.title: User
User.description: A user profile in the application.

Artifact.title: Artifact
Artifact.description: A saved generation artifact (skin, map, mod, etc.).

userId.description: ID of the user who owns this artifact.

type.description: The type of the generated artifact.

title.description: Title or prompt used for the generation.

content.description: The generated content (SVG, source code, JSON, etc.).

/artifacts/{artifactId}.description: Stores all artifacts saved by users.
